topic: Luis Diaz arrived on the world stage — one assist, one goal as Colombia beat Uzbekistan 3-1 to top Group K
subject: luis-diaz

hook.spoken_hook: Luis Diaz. 27 years. Zero World Cup goals. Ninety minutes changed everything.

scenes.voiceover: Luis Diaz. 27 years. Zero World Cup goals. Until tonight.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black background, gold gradient accents (#F7D774 to #C8881B). Large condensed white 'DIAZ' dead center, gold underline. Floodlight bokeh behind. Premium broadcast tease.

scenes.voiceover: 40th minute. His pass splits the Uzbekistan defense. Munoz scores. One-nil.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black bg. White condensed text 'THE PASS THAT CHANGED IT' across center. Gold accent underline. Minimal and bold.

scenes.voiceover: Uzbekistan hit back. First goal in their history. Now it's on Diaz to answer.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black bg. White condensed text 'THEN THE PRESSURE' across center. Gold accent underline. Minimal and bold.

scenes.voiceover: Five minutes later. Low and hard. First World Cup goal. Diaz makes it two-one.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black bg. White condensed text 'FIRST WORLD CUP GOAL' across center. Gold accent underline. Minimal and bold.

scenes.voiceover: Stoppage time. Campaz makes it three-one. Diaz's night is done.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Vertical 9:16, deep black bg. White condensed text 'NIGHT COMPLETE' across center. Gold accent underline. Minimal and bold.

scenes.voiceover: Colombia top Group K. Portugal and Congo drew. Subscribe for daily World Cup stories.

comment_bait: One assist. One goal. Is Diaz Colombia's most dangerous weapon at this World Cup? Convince me I'm wrong.
cta: Follow for your daily World Cup stories
music_mood: Epic cinematic buildup with a triumphant drop — orchestral, rising tension through the equalizer, releasing on Diaz's goal.

thumbnail.concept: Luis Diaz in Colombia yellow mid-celebration, 'DIAZ' in bold gold type. Black background. No AI-generated face — use a real CC photo if available.

youtube_title: Uzbekistan 1-3 Colombia | Luis Diaz Arrives on the World Stage | 2026 World Cup
youtube_description:
Luis Diaz waited 27 years for his World Cup moment. It came in 90 minutes — one stunning assist, one clinical finish. Colombia beat Uzbekistan 3-1 to top Group K. Fayzullaev scored Uzbekistan's first ever World Cup goal, but Diaz answered immediately.

Subscribe for daily World Cup stories 🇨🇴
instagram_caption:
27 years. Zero World Cup goals. Until tonight. Diaz arrived. 🟡🔵

Is he Colombia's most dangerous weapon at this World Cup? Convince me I'm wrong.
